violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front, has small hole. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
The area outside the building (including sides, out back, and near dumpster enclosure) had an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, unused items, and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. The outside dumpster was too full to close. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2025
The area outside the building (including sides, out back, and near dumpster enclosure) had an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, unused items, and debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as juice) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

Eggs, juice, cheese, and cheese packs with sausage observed held at 56-58 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings on floors beneath market shelves, and on window ledge near automobile oil. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Big Blue Bug pest control service. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

The door to the outside, located in the front of the store, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
Food observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

The open case was not in good repair, not holding food at 41 degrees F or below. No food requiring refrigeration is to be stored in the open case until it is functioning properly. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of shelves in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
The dumpster enclosure is in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
An accumulation of litter and leaf litter observed in dumpster enclosure. Dumpster area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The floors in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue, trash, and/or debris. The floors beneath market shelves have an accumulation of rodent droppings, soil residue, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the ( ) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions.All nonfunctional or unnecessary items are to be removed from the premises. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The area outside along the building has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, debris, and unused items. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
